qids.subject: Algorithms
qids.prose: What does the following code do? var a, b: integer; begin a:=a+b; b:=a-b; a:=a-b; end; A. exchanges and B. doubles and stores in C. doubles and stores in D. leaves and unchanged E. none of the above

qids.subject: Algorithms
qids.prose: What function of , is computed by this program? Function what(x, n:integer): integer: Var value : integer begin value := 1 if n > 0 then begin if n mod 2 =1 then value := value * x;

qids.subject: Algorithms
qids.prose: In the following Pascal program segment, what is the value of X after the execution of the program segment? X := -10; Y := 20; If X > Y then if X < 0 then X := abs(X) else X := 2*X; A. B. C. D. None

qids.subject: Algorithms
qids.prose: Assume that and are non-zero positive integers. What does the following Pascal program segment do? while X <> Y do if X > Y then X := X - Y else Y := Y - X; write(X); A. Computes the LCM of two numbers B. Divides the larger number by the smaller number C. Computes the GCD of two numbers D. None of t
